summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MN1 Android Auto Client documentation browser. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads and displays properly with full functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/project/tree returns file tree with all 42 project files
Backend API /api/project/stats returns correct line counts (6,966 lines) and file counts (42 files)
Backend API /api/project/file?path=README.md returns README content with proper markdown detection
Backend API /api/project/file?path=src/config.h returns C header content with syntax detection
Backend API /api/project/file?path=src/main.c returns main source code with proper language detection
Backend API /api/project/file?path=docs/03_PERFORMANCE_ANALYSIS.md returns performance doc with markdown detection
Frontend loads and displays the file tree sidebar with categorized sections (Project Root, Documentation, Source Core, USB/AOA Layer, Protocol Layer, Video Decode, etc.)
Frontend loads README.md by default and renders markdown content with proper formatting
Clicking C source files shows syntax-highlighted code with line numbers (tested with main.c - 432 lines)
Clicking documentation files renders markdown with proper formatting and colored headers
Stats bar shows correct file counts (42 files, 6,966 lines, 214.4 KB total, 18 .c + 17 .h, 6 docs)
Sidebar toggle button works to hide/show the file tree
File tree properly categorizes files into logical sections
Markdown rendering works correctly with headers, formatting, and styling
Source code viewer displays line numbers and syntax highlighting
